'''hawuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:llamah|llamah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:llamah|llamah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hawuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæwizhith|hæwizhith]] || [[word:hæwizhij|hæwizhij]] || [[word:hæwizhish|hæwizhish]] || [[word:hæwizhi|hæwizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hawuwuzhuth|hawuwuzhuth]] || [[word:hawuwuzhuj|hawuwuzhuj]] || [[word:hawuwuzhush|hawuwuzhush]] || [[word:hawuwuzhu|hawuwuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hawuzhuth|hawuzhuth]] || [[word:hawuzhuj|hawuzhuj]] || [[word:hawuzhush|hawuzhush]] || [[word:hawuzhu|hawuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hawufzhuth|hawufzhuth]] || [[word:hawufzhuj|hawufzhuj]] || [[word:hawufzhush|hawufzhush]] || [[word:hawufzhuf|hawufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hawuzhuthu|hawuzhuthu]] || [[word:hawuzhuju|hawuzhuju]] || [[word:hawuzhushu|hawuzhushu]] || [[word:hawuzhuku|hawuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hawuzhuth|hawuzhuth]] || [[word:hawuzhuj|hawuzhuj]] || [[word:hawuzhush|hawuzhush]] || [[word:hawuzhu|hawuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hawuzhuthul|hawuzhuthul]] || [[word:hawuzhujul|hawuzhujul]] || [[word:hawuzhushul|hawuzhushul]] || [[word:hawuzhukul|hawuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hawuzhuthuthu|hawuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:hawuzhujuju|hawuzhujuju]] || [[word:hawuzhushushu|hawuzhushushu]] || [[word:hawuzhuku|hawuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hawuzhuthun|hawuzhuthun]] || [[word:hawuzhujun|hawuzhujun]] || [[word:hawuzhushun|hawuzhushun]] || [[word:hawuzhukun|hawuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hawuzhuthuoro|hawuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:hawuzhujuoro|hawuzhujuoro]] || [[word:hawuzhushuoro|hawuzhushuoro]] || [[word:hawuzhukuoro|hawuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
